title: New Electric Heat Pump Chases Fossil Fuels Out Of The Boiler Room
description:
The US heat pump startup AtmosZero has enlisted the legacy boiler supplier R.F. MacDonald to help boot fossil fuels out of commercial and industrial steam systems.

The post New Electric Heat Pump Chases Fossil Fuels Out Of The Boiler Room appeared first on CleanTechnica.
